message:
feat(polyfills): add missing crypto and EventEmitter APIs

Crypto (Zig native):
- Add md5 and sha384 hash algorithms
- Add sha384, sha1, md5 HMAC algorithms
- Add timingSafeEqual for constant-time comparison
- Add randomInt for secure random integers
- Add pbkdf2Sync for key derivation (sha256/sha512/sha1)

EventEmitter:
- Add prependListener/prependOnceListener
- Add rawListeners method
- Add static EventEmitter.listenerCount
- Add static EventEmitter.once (returns Promise)
- Add static EventEmitter.on (returns async iterator)

Tests:
- Add crypto hash tests (sha256, md5)
- Add randomUUID format test
- Add randomInt range test
- Add EventEmitter tests
